{{Infobox character
|nom=Mabel
|apparition=Appears in book 1
|status=Unknown
}}

== Biography ==

Mabel is a child acquainted with Alice. According to Alice's assessment, Mabel possesses very little knowledge. In Alice's anxious imaginings about having been transformed into Mabel, she pictures Mabel living in a "poky little house," with "next to no toys to play with," and having "ever so many lessons to learn."

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Personnages du Tome 1]]
